title: Power, Incentives, and Failure Modes
shortSummary: Go deeper into the distortions inside political systems: capture, short-termism, bureaucratic drift, media incentives, performative politics, and institutional decay.
whyItMatters: Once the basic map is clear, this is the module that explains why political systems still underperform even when the formal rules look reasonable.
mentalModels: Systems fail where incentives quietly point the wrong way
Good rules can still produce weak outcomes
Performance and legitimacy are not the same thing

goDeeper.label: Return to the politics system map
goDeeper.description: Re-read the master map with failure modes in view.

goDeeper.label: Review the politics signals
goDeeper.description: Use current developments to test which failure modes are live.
